name: Riot Helmet
description: Effective only against melee weapons, thrown weapons, and unarmed attacks. Cannot be concealed

name: Kevlar Vest
description: If warm beneath clothing, requires an alertness test to notice

name: Reinforced Kevlar Vest
description: If warm beneath clothing, requires an alertness test (+20%) to notice

name: Bomb Suit
description: Helmet and body protection. Cannot be concealed
